User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://sialkotsamplemasters.com/sitemap.xml

# Allow important pages
Allow: /products
Allow: /shop
Allow: /portfolio
Allow: /blog
Allow: /about
Allow: /services
Allow: /contact
Allow: /rfq

# Disallow admin and system paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin-login
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/

# Crawl-delay for responsible crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Special rules for specific bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0.5

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1
